email_subject: Don’t miss conversations in Internship Group
email_body:
Don’t miss conversations in Internship Group 



.....................................Internship Group 

This group is for interns and internship practices. 



College / University - Please contact us if you are looking to place your students for internship. 

Students- Please contact us if you are looking for an internship. . 



Employers - Please contact us if you are looking students for internship.
